info.title: Splunk Analyzer Action Group
info.description: Tools for running SPL searches against Splunk via its REST API.

post.description: Run an SPL search over a recent time window and return result rows. If no search is supplied, a default error/exception scan is used.

search.description: SPL search string. May omit a leading 'search' command. Omit entirely to use the default error scan.

windowMinutes.description: How many minutes back from now to search. Default 60.

maxCount.description: Maximum result rows to return. Default 200.
